mini_games.title: Ultimate Pong
mini_games.desc: A browser-based Pong revival with neon visuals, three-tier AI and local two-player support. Features power shots, rally tracking and responsive keyboard or touch controls.

mini_games.title: Cyber Putt
mini_games.desc: A cyberpunk mini golf game with drag-to-shoot controls, nine procedurally generated holes and reactive obstacles including bouncers, sand traps, boost pads and portals. Features a par-based scoring system with stroke ratings from hole-in-one to double bogey.

mini_games.title: Breakout
mini_games.desc: A retro brick-breaker with six progressive levels, power-up drops and multi-ball mechanics. Features paddle-angle aiming, particle bursts on brick destruction and a local high-score system.

mini_games.title: Maze of Echoes
mini_games.desc: A top-down maze explorer with 30 hand-designed levels, fog-of-war visibility and split-screen two-player racing. Features step particles, collision sparks, screen shake and a mobile D-pad for touch controls.

mini_games.title: Epic Memory Game
mini_games.desc: A card-matching memory game with ten icon themes, three difficulty levels and a combo streak scoring system. Features a timed peek phase, confetti win celebration and local two-player competitive mode.

mini_games.title: Tic Tac Toe
mini_games.desc: A classic Tic Tac Toe with three AI difficulty levels powered by alpha-beta minimax, SVG win-line animations and a persistent score tracker. Features hover ghost marks, win cell highlighting and a particle background.

mini_games.title: Strike Billiards
mini_games.desc: A drag-to-shoot pool game with realistic ball physics, elastic collisions and pocket detection. Supports up to four players with combo scoring, scratch penalties and a win screen with ranked results.

mini_games.title: Cyber Worm
mini_games.desc: A Snake-inspired arcade game with a cyberpunk aesthetic, featuring power-ups (Shield, Overclock, Ghost, Virus), combo scoring, firewall obstacles and both single-player campaign and local multiplayer modes with up to three players.

mini_games.title: DroneX
mini_games.desc: A cyberpunk drone survival game with tap-to-fly controls, moving obstacles, combo scoring, data chip collection and power-ups including EMP blasts and shield orbs.

mini_games.title: Grid Breach
mini_games.desc: A cyberpunk block-stacking game with a 12×22 grid, nine unique pentomino pieces and power-ups including Purge, Shield, Nova bomb and Overclock. Features a glitch morph mechanic, garbage rows at higher levels, combo chains and a dramatic system overload game-over animation.

mini_games.title: Data Link
mini_games.desc: Rotate pipe segments on a grid to connect data nodes from source to target. Decrypt locked cells, survive glitch cells that auto-rotate and manage system integrity before the timer depletes. Grid size and hazard frequency scale with each level.

mini_games.title: Cyber Swarm
mini_games.desc: Pixel aliens descend from above. Move horizontally, shoot and dodge enemy fire. Collect power-ups (triple shot, shield, bomb) and survive as many waves as possible. Every fifth wave triggers a boss fight. Available in solo and co-op mode.

mini_games.title: Road Rivals
mini_games.desc: Top-down street racing against AI traffic and rival cars. Dodge cones, barriers and oil slicks while collecting boost, shields and coins. Build your score multiplier with near-misses. Supports local multiplayer for up to four drivers with three difficulty levels.

mini_games.title: Hand Duel
mini_games.desc: A beautifully crafted Rock Paper Scissors experience reimagined as a tense card duel. Outsmart the AI in best-of-5 battles, chain win streaks and enjoy sharp taunts with stunning card flips and visual effects.

demos.title: Try Not To Rage Series
demos.desc: Information and prototypes before the official release of the Try Not To Rage game series. Play and learn what to expect in the full game!
